name: Chobani Flip Peanut Butter Dream Greek Yogurt
popularityContext: Chobani Flip is a top-selling US Greek yogurt format that pairs a yogurt cup with a separate mix-in compartment of crunchy and sweet toppings, widely stocked in the dairy aisle as a single-serve dessert-style snack.

ingredients.item: Chobani Flip Peanut Butter Dream Greek yogurt cup with mix-in

prepNotes: Pour the peanut butter and chocolate mix-in compartment into the yogurt side, stir, and eat with the provided spoon. No other preparation needed.

nutrition.method: Calculated from Chobani Flip product nutrition panel via eatthismuch.com and mynetdiary.com

regionAvailability.notes: Sold individually and in multipacks in the dairy aisle of nearly every US supermarket year-round.
